headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Intl Flavors & Fragrances, Raises Price Target to $95
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Lisa De Neve   maintains Intl Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $93 to $95.
